# ABLITERATED.cloud

> Free open-licensed Hugging Face model weights labeled uncensored and abliterated, available through one token-protected OpenAI-compatible API powered by vLLM and scale-to-zero Modal GPUs.

ABLITERATED.cloud is currently a private evaluation service. Live v0.3.1 exposes three hard-stopped routes. A guarded Ornith 397B fourth route is prepared for the next budgeted release.

## Primary resources

- [Human landing page](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/): Product overview, models, costs, security, and access.
- [Markdown landing page](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/index.md): Compact agent-friendly product documentation.
- [Full agent context](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/llms-full.txt): Expanded operational and model details.
- [OpenAPI catalog](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/openapi.json): Current API contract and model identifiers.
- [Authentication guide](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/auth.md): Bearer-token and lifecycle requirements.
- [Agent skill](https://eminogrande.github.io/mn-uncensored/skills/abliterated-cloud/SKILL.md): Safe instructions for agents using the API.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/eminogrande/mn-uncensored): Open-source implementation, tests, operations, release notes, and incident report.
- [Exact model record](https://github.com/eminogrande/mn-uncensored/blob/main/docs/MODELS.md): Hugging Face artifacts, revisions, licenses, context, parsers, and hardware.

## Model identifiers

- `mn/god` → `huihui-ai/Huihui-Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-abliterated` → planned $5.44752/hour
- `mn/code` → `YuYu1015/YuYu1015-Ornith-1.0-35B-abliterated` → planned $5.44752/hour
- `mn/fast` → `huihui-ai/Huihui-Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-abliterated` → planned $2.34144/hour
- `mn/ornith-397b` → `cebeuq/Ornith-1.0-397B-abliterated-W4A16` → planned $10.89504/hour; next budgeted release; legacy alias `nuri/ornith-397b-abliterated`

Model weight downloads are free. Managed GPU inference is paid. These +20% reference rates are planned, not currently metered or charged.

## Access

Request private access through WhatsApp:
https://wa.me/13103408213?text=Hi%20Emin%2C%20I%20would%20like%20to%20request%20access%20to%20ABLITERATED.cloud
